mapper.sql: select variant_id, product_id, store_id, shopify_variant_id, shopify_inventory_item_id, last_shopify_import_time, sku, price, compare_at_price, purchase_price, purchase_url, option_values, media_id, position, pk_width, pk_height, pk_length, material_weight, pk_weight, freight, is_actual_shipment, exchange_rate, unit_cost_price, suggested_price, profit_rate, profit, is_active_available, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from erp_product_variant

left join ( select order_metric.variant_id, count(1) as order_count_30d, coalesce(sum(order_metric.sales_amount), 0) as sales_amount_30d, coalesce(sum(order_metric.refund_amount), 0) as refund_amount_30d, coalesce(sum(order_metric.pending_purchase_count), 0) as pending_purchase_count, coalesce(sum(order_metric.fulfillment_exception_count), 0) as fulfillment_exception_count from ( select oli.variant_id, o.order_id, coalesce(sum(oli.total_price), 0) as sales_amount, coalesce(max(o.total_refund), 0) as refund_amount, coalesce(sum(case when pt.purchase_status = 'PENDING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as pending_purchase_count, max(case when fr.sync_status = 'FAILED' then 1 else 0 end) as fulfillment_exception_count from erp_shopify_order_line_item oli inner join erp_shopify_order o on o.order_id = oli.order_id left join erp_purchase_task pt on pt.order_line_item_id = oli.line_item_id left join erp_fulfillment_record fr on fr.order_id = o.order_id where oli.variant_id is not null and o.placed_at >= date_sub(now(), interval 30 day) group by oli.variant_id, o.order_id ) order_metric group by order_metric.variant_id ) metric on metric.variant_id = v.variant_id

where.if: and coalesce(v.profit_rate, case when v.price is not null and v.price > 0 then (v.price - coalesce(v.purchase_price, 0) - coalesce(v.freight, 0)) / v.price else 1 end ) < 0.1500

if.test: params != null and params.beginCreateTime != null and params.beginCreateTime != '' and params.endCreateTime != null and params.endCreateTime != ''
params.beginCreateTime != null and params.beginCreateTime != '' and params.endCreateTime != null and params.endCreateTime != ''

mapper.select:
select v.variant_id, v.product_id, p.product_title, p.spu, coalesce(s.store_name, s.shop_name) as shop_name, coalesce(pm.nas_media_url, pm.shopify_media_url, pm.transcoded_media_url) as main_media_url, p.sync_status as product_sync_status, v.store_id, v.shopify_variant_id, v.shopify_inventory_item_id, v.last_shopify_import_time, v.sku, v.price, v.compare_at_price, v.purchase_price, v.purchase_url, v.option_values, v.media_id, coalesce(vm.nas_media_url, vm.shopify_media_url, vm.transcoded_media_url) as media_url, v.position, v.pk_width, v.pk_height, v.pk_length, v.material_weight, v.pk_weight, v.freight, v.is_actual_shipment, v.unit_cost_price, v.suggested_price, v.profit_rate, v.profit, v.is_active_available, concat_ws(',', if(v.sku is null or v.sku = '', 'SKU_MISSING', null), if(v.purchase_url is null or v.purchase_url = '', 'PURCHASE_URL_MISSING', null), if(v.shopify_variant_id is null or v.shopify_variant_id = '', 'SHOPIFY_ID_MISSING', null), if(v.pk_width is null or v.pk_height is null or v.pk_length is null or v.pk_weight is null, 'PACKAGE_MISSING', null), if(coalesce(v.profit_rate, case when v.price is not null and v.price > 0 then (v.price - coalesce(v.purchase_price, 0) - coalesce(v.freight, 0)) / v.price else 1 end ) < 0.1500, 'LOW_PROFIT', null) ) as missing_flags, case when p.sync_status is null or p.sync_status != '1' then 1 else 0 end as need_sync, coalesce(metric.order_count_30d, 0) as order_count_30d, coalesce(metric.sales_amount_30d, 0) as sales_amount_30d, coalesce(metric.refund_amount_30d, 0) as refund_amount_30d, coalesce(metric.pending_purchase_count, 0) as pending_purchase_count, coalesce(metric.fulfillment_exception_count, 0) as fulfillment_exception_count, v.remark from erp_product_variant v left join erp_product p on p.product_id = v.product_id left join erp_shopify_store s on s.store_id = v.store_id left join erp_media vm on vm.media_id = v.media_id left join erp_media pm on pm.media_id = p.main_media_id
order by metric.order_count_30d desc, v.update_time desc, v.create_time desc

select count(1) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.sync_status is null or p.sync_status != '1' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as needSyncCount, coalesce(sum(case when coalesce(v.profit_rate, case when v.price is not null and v.price > 0 then (v.price - coalesce(v.purchase_price, 0) - coalesce(v.freight, 0)) / v.price else 1 end ) < 0.1500 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as lowProfitCount, coalesce(sum(case when v.purchase_url is null or v.purchase_url = '' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as missingPurchaseUrlCount, coalesce(sum(case when metric.order_count_30d > 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as orderedSkuCount30d from erp_product_variant v left join erp_product p on p.product_id = v.product_id left join erp_shopify_store s on s.store_id = v.store_id left join erp_media vm on vm.media_id = v.media_id left join erp_media pm on pm.media_id = p.main_media_id
mapper.insert:
insert into erp_product_variant
product_id, store_id, shopify_variant_id, shopify_inventory_item_id, last_shopify_import_time, sku, price, compare_at_price, purchase_price, purchase_url, option_values, media_id, position, pk_width, pk_height, pk_length, material_weight, pk_weight, freight, is_actual_shipment, exchange_rate, unit_cost_price, suggested_price, profit_rate, profit, is_active_available, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag,
#{productId}, #{storeId}, #{shopifyVariantId}, #{shopifyInventoryItemId}, #{lastShopifyImportTime}, #{sku}, #{price}, #{compareAtPrice}, #{purchasePrice}, #{purchaseUrl}, #{optionValues}, #{mediaId}, #{position}, #{pkWidth}, #{pkHeight}, #{pkLength}, #{materialWeight}, #{pkWeight}, #{freight}, #{isActualShipment}, #{exchangeRate}, #{unitCostPrice}, #{suggestedPrice}, #{profitRate}, #{profit}, #{isActiveAvailable}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete:
delete from erp_product_variant where variant_id in
#{variantId}
